intentSynonyms: look up an event in outlook
fetch a single event in outlook
view one specific event in outlook
description: Get the full details of a single calendar event, including body, attendees and their responses, location, reminders, and recurrence status.

event_id.description: The event ID (from list_events or get_calendar_view)

time_zone.description: Time zone to return start/end times in (e.g. "Eastern Standard Time"). Defaults to UTC.
